{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Meia's healing ability
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] can accelerate healing using dark blue scales.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
